opportunities.title: Customer Success Manager
opportunities.description:
INNERGY is transforming the woodworking industry with purpose built, cloud based ERP software designed exclusively for custom manufacturers. Our platform helps businesses operate smarter, faster, and more efficiently while seamlessly connecting design, production, and delivery for teams creating architectural millwork, cabinetry, and casework.

opportunities.description: About the Role   We are seeking an experienced and versatile  India Business Marketing Lead  to drive OpenAI’s enterprise and B2B marketing strategy in India. opportunities.title: Warehouse Inventory Clerk
opportunities.description:
Overview

The Warehouse Inventory Clerk will conduct accurate inventory counting and reporting to ensure the Warehouse Department can function effectively in fulfilling orders. This is an entry-level position reporting to the Warehouse Manager.


Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in managing inventory for both Caribbean Bottling Company (CBC) and Caribbean Wines & Spirits (CWS)
  • Monitor inventory levels to ensure all orders can be completely filled

opportunities.title: [Hiring] Level Designer 3D for Indie Game Demo (Godot) — 2 Small Biomes — Budget up to ~€400
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Level Designer 3D for Indie Game Demo (Godot) — 2 Small Biomes — Budget up to ~€400

Hey, I’m a solo dev working on my first playable demo and I’m looking for a level designer to help me build 2 small 3D biomes. The game is basically Zelda: Breath of the Wild meets a village builder. You explore the world, free villagers from enemy camps, and bring them back to your village. The villagers then unlock new buildings, blueprints, weapons, abilities, or other upgrades. opportunities.title: National Security Cyber Evaluation Lead
opportunities.description: About the Team   OpenAI’s mission is to ensure that general-purpose artificial intelligence benefits all of humanity. The Global Affairs team builds authentic, collaborative relationships with policymakers, public officials, and the broader AI policy community so that external insights inform our work and OpenAI can contribute to effective policy, industry standards, and the safe and beneficial development of AI.
